quests.name: Into the Mire
quests.description: The mists of Silfmoor hide old horrors. Thin the swarm.
dialogueStart: Silfmoor swallowed a whole patrol last month.
Whatever breeds in that bog is spreading. Cut it back before it reaches the road.
dialogueCompletion: Good. The swarm won't miss them.
But one of my scouts is still out there — wounded. Bring them home.

quests.name: The Wounded Scout
quests.description: Escort the wounded scout out of the bog. Keep the beasts off them.

objectives.description: Escort the Wounded Scout to safety (stay close — enemies nearby wound them)

dialogueStart: The scout can barely walk. Stay near them — if the beasts swarm, they're finished.
Move them to the ridge on the far side of the marsh.
dialogueCompletion: You brought them back alive. Not everyone would have.
The scout babbled about a sunken altar... and something waking beneath it.

quests.name: The Sunken Altar
quests.description: Hold the sunken altar against the bog's fury while the ritual seals it.

objectives.description: Repel 3 waves at the Sunken Altar

dialogueStart: Amuun's seal needs time. The bog will throw everything at you.
Stand on the altar. Hold it through three assaults — no matter what crawls out.
dialogueCompletion: The altar holds. The seal is set.
You've done more than most survive, {player}. Silfmoor is quiet again — for now.
